chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P^0.0-1278 0f 2023 Date Order with signature Of Judge For hearing of main case 07.12.2023 Mr Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for Respondents Mr Saeed Ahmed Wassan, AAG 7و7 +٠٠+ +و٣٣ Learned Counsel for the Respondents has filed schedule for payment of outstanding amount in respect of pensionary benefits to the Petitioner which i5 taken on recoro' copV whereof has been provided to learned Counsel for the petitioner After going through the same, learned Counsel for the Petitioner is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of However default or non payment Of said amount to the petitioner would expose violator to the contempt proceedings
